AboutHero.title: About Us
AboutHero.description: We specialize in developing and implementing innovative artificial intelligence solutions. Our goal is to advance cutting-edge technologies and educate the next generation of professionals.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To create a dynamic academic environment that fosters cutting-edge research, innovative thinking, and practical applications in the field of artificial intelligence. We aim to equip students with fundamental theoretical knowledge and strong practical skills.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be a globally recognized center of excellence in AI education and research, driving technological progress and contributing to a smarter, more sustainable society through ethical AI solutions.

topics.title: Machine and Deep Learning
topics.desc: Development of advanced neural network architectures, algorithm optimization for pattern recognition, and application of deep learning to complex datasets.

topics.title: Computer Vision
topics.desc: Image processing, object detection, facial recognition, and medical image analysis using state-of-the-art vision models.

topics.title: Natural Language Processing
topics.desc: Text analysis, sentiment classification, machine translation, and the development of conversational AI systems and LLM-based applications.

topics.title: Data Science and Analytics
topics.desc: Big data processing, predictive modeling, statistical analysis, and extracting actionable insights from complex datasets.

topics.title: Robotics and Automation
topics.desc: Autonomous systems, reinforcement learning for control, and intelligent robotic perception in dynamic environments.

topics.title: IoT and Edge AI
topics.desc: Deploying machine learning models on resource-constrained devices, sensor networks, and smart city infrastructure.

ethics.title: AI Safety and Ethics
ethics.desc: Ensuring AI model robustness against adversarial attacks, fairness, explainability, and ethical AI deployment.

ApplicantsHero.description: Explore our comprehensive curriculum designed to prepare the next generation of leaders in artificial intelligence. We offer degree programs across all levels of higher education.

BachelorPage.heroSubtitle: F3 Computer Science: Artificial Intelligence Systems
BachelorPage.goalText: Our program provides a unique opportunity to master artificial intelligence technologies and turn knowledge into practice. You will acquire not just theory, but real-world skills in developing AI solutions in machine learning, NLP, CV, Big Data, and more.
skills: AI libraries: TensorFlow, PyTorch, OpenCV, etc.
BachelorPage.initiativesConclusion: The AI Department shapes not only highly qualified professionals but also innovators, researchers, and entrepreneurs ready to build the future of artificial intelligence.

initiatives.title: Strong Faculty Team
initiatives.desc: Our educators are experts with experience in projects and conferences, blending academic and practical knowledge.

initiatives.title: Educational Program with SoftServe
initiatives.desc: A joint program that enables learning from practitioners and completing real project tasks with company experts.

initiatives.title: Dual Education
initiatives.desc: Combining studies with practice in IT companies. Students build their careers while studying.

initiatives.title: Project-Based Learning
initiatives.desc: Courses feature real projects mentored by business representatives, building market-ready skills.

initiatives.title: AI Incubator
initiatives.desc: A platform for developing startups, conducting research, and launching AI products. Mentorship, resources, and support to bring ideas to life.

initiatives.title: Data Science Club
initiatives.desc: A horizontal knowledge-sharing culture. Senior students help juniors with ML, analytics, and AI.

initiatives.title: Robotics LAB
initiatives.desc: A hands-on laboratory for developing robotics solutions using sensors, AI, and modern platforms.

initiatives.title: StartUP
initiatives.desc: A platform for developing business ideas, where students pitch startups to investors and receive support.

BachelorPage.careerDesc: After graduation, you can work in IT companies, research centers, financial institutions, medical laboratories, and other high-tech sectors.

International.title: International Opportunities
International.subtitle: Erasmus+ Partners and Double Degree Programs

levels.title: F3 Computer Science
levels.subtitle: Artificial Intelligence Systems
bullets: A unique opportunity to master AI technologies: from machine learning to NLP and Computer Vision.
Teamwork on real projects from the first semester and mentoring from top IT experts starting in the 2nd year.
In-depth English language study and Soft Skills development for working in modern tech companies.

levels.title: F3 Computer Science (MSc)
levels.subtitle: Applied Artificial Intelligence
bullets: Advanced study: deep learning, neural network architectures, and complex language and image processing systems.
Technical Leadership: combining deep technical expertise with team and project management skills.
POC → MVP: step-by-step development of AI solutions from concept to a real business product under practitioners' guidance.

levels.title: F3 Computer Science (PhD)
levels.subtitle: Intelligent Systems Research
bullets: Cutting-edge scientific research in specialized AI fields and publications in leading international journals.
International collaboration through grants and exchange programs with top global research institutes.
Preparation for a career in academia or high-tech R&D centers of global corporations.

levels.title: Geoanalytics
levels.subtitle: Computer Science and Earth Sciences
bullets: Dual specialization based at the AI Systems and Higher Geodesy departments.
50% IT block (Python, cloud services, ML) and 50% Geo block (GIS, satellite monitoring).
Global career prospects: Smart City, AgroTech, ClimateTech, and DefenseTech.

students.name: Yevhenii Orza
students.text: The Artificial Intelligence Systems Department truly opens up many opportunities for students. The professors share not only theory but also live cases from the IT industry — this helps immensely in understanding how everything works in practice. There are many directions for growth, so everyone can find their niche. It's also great that with the department's support, you can realistically launch your own startup or develop an original IT project.

students.name: Oleh Bandrivskyi
students.text: Studying at the Artificial Intelligence Systems Department, I realized how right this decision was for my future. Here I don't just gain knowledge, but I also unlock my potential in a rapidly developing field that is of huge importance to the world.

students.name: Liliana Mirchuk
students.text: For me, the AI Department means opportunities, great networking, and growth. You really need to study hard, be proactive, and use all the opportunities the department provides. And then — everything will work out!

students.name: Andrii Tarasov
students.text: By studying at the AI Department, you will become familiar with various directions in the field of computer science. You will learn to apply artificial intelligence tools to solve diverse tasks and gain experience working on real projects.

students.name: Vitalii Mil
students.text: For me, the most important thing is the people. I believe that your environment shapes your personality, and this department has exactly the kind of people you want to grow and develop with. The education is truly comprehensive — you need to study the theory well.

students.name: Anastasiia Veretilnyk
students.text: Before entering the university, I really wanted to work at SoftServe. The department gave me a solid technical foundation and many different opportunities. Since my 3rd year, I started studying via dual education, combining my studies with work at the company.

About.title: Our Mission and Vision
About.missionDesc: The Department of Artificial Intelligence Systems (AIS) at the Institute of Computer Science and Information Technologies, Lviv Polytechnic National University, prepares highly qualified specialists in the field of artificial intelligence.
About.visionDesc: We strive to create an ecosystem where academic knowledge merges with practical research and innovation, preparing leaders capable of solving today's most complex challenges using intelligent systems.

Hero.description: We are shaping a new generation of AI professionals who build the technologies of the future at Lviv Polytechnic.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.content: The Department of Artificial Intelligence Systems (AIS) at Lviv Polytechnic National University respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard information when you visit our website.

sections.title: 2. Information We Collect
sections.content:
We may collect the following types of information:

• Personal data you voluntarily provide via the contact form (name, email address, message content).
• Technical data automatically collected during your visit (IP address, browser type, device information, pages visited).
• Cookies and similar tracking technologies used to improve site functionality.

sections.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
sections.content:
We use the collected information to:

• Respond to your inquiries submitted through the contact form.
• Improve and optimize our website experience.
• Analyze website traffic and usage patterns.
• Comply with legal obligations.

sections.title: 4. Data Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share data only when required by law or with trusted service providers who assist in operating our website, subject to confidentiality agreements.

sections.title: 5. Data Security
sections.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

sections.title: 6. Your Rights
sections.content:
You have the right to:

• Access the personal data we hold about you.
• Request correction or deletion of your data.
• Withdraw consent for data processing at any time.
• Lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

To exercise these rights, contact us at ai.dept@lpnu.ua.

sections.title: 7. Cookies
sections.content: Our website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect some website functionality.

sections.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing and using the website of the Department of Artificial Intelligence Systems (AIS) at Lviv Polytechnic National University, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Use.

sections.title: 2. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is the property of the Department of AIS or its content providers and is protected by intellectual property laws. Unauthorized reproduction or distribution is prohibited.

sections.title: 3. Permitted Use
sections.content:
You may use this website for personal, non-commercial, and informational purposes. You agree not to:

• Copy, modify, or distribute website content without authorization.
• Use the website for any unlawful purpose.
• Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the website.
• Interfere with the website's operation or security.

sections.title: 4. User-Submitted Content
sections.content: By submitting information through the contact form or other means, you grant us the right to use this information to respond to your inquiry. You are responsible for ensuring that any information you provide is accurate and does not violate the rights of third parties.

sections.title: 5. Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.content: This website is provided "as is" without any warranties, express or implied. We do not guarantee that the website will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of harmful components.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: The Department of AIS shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of or inability to use this website.

sections.title: 7. External Links
sections.content: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of these external sites.

sections.title: 8. Governing Law
sections.content: These Terms of Use are governed by the laws of Ukraine. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of competent jurisdiction in Lviv, Ukraine.

sections.title: 9. Changes to Terms
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Continued use of the website after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

hero.title: Bachelor of Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence Systems).

mission.title: 🎯 Goal
mission.desc: Our program is a unique opportunity to master artificial intelligence technologies and turn knowledge into practice. You will gain not just theory, but real skills in developing AI solutions in machine learning, NLP, CV, Big Data, and much more.

skills.title: 📚 What you will learn
items: AI libraries: TensorFlow, PyTorch, OpenCV, etc.
Data Engineering, AI Ethics, Data Visualization

initiatives.title: Key Initiatives of the Department
initiatives.footer: The AI Systems Department forms not only highly qualified specialists but also innovators, researchers, and entrepreneurs ready to create the future of artificial intelligence.

items.title: Strong teaching team
items.desc: Instructors are experts with experience in projects and conferences, combining academic and practical knowledge to inspire students toward innovation.

items.title: Educational program with SoftServe
items.desc: The joint program allows students to gain knowledge directly from practitioners and complete real project tasks with company experts.

items.title: Dual education
items.desc: Combining study and practice in IT companies. Students build their careers while studying.

items.title: Project-based learning
items.desc: Courses include real projects under the mentorship of business representatives, forming practical skills to meet market needs.

items.title: AI-Incubator
items.desc: A platform for developing startups, research, and AI products. Students receive mentorship, resources, and support to implement their ideas.

items.title: Data Science Club
items.desc: A horizontal culture of knowledge sharing is formed. Senior students help juniors with machine learning, analytics, and AI.

items.title: Robotics LAB
items.desc: A practical laboratory for developing robotics solutions using sensors, AI, and modern platforms (Jetson, Raspberry Pi, etc.).

items.title: StartUP
items.desc: A platform for developing business ideas where students pitch their startups to potential investors and get real opportunities for development and promotion.

career.title: 🚀 Career Opportunities
career.desc: After graduation, you will be able to work in IT companies, research centers, financial institutions, medical laboratories, and other high-tech fields.

melnykova.name: Nataliia Melnykova
melnykova.role: Head of the AI Systems Department
melnykova.text: “The Artificial Intelligence Systems Department is a powerful educational and scientific hub that creates a unique environment for developing talent in AI and IT. It actively implements innovative learning models, combining academic training with practical interaction with the IT industry.”

shakhovska.name: Nataliia Shakhovska
shakhovska.role: Rector, Curator of the AI program
shakhovska.text: “Artificial intelligence is a trend that, according to global analytical companies, will become commonplace in everyday life by 2050. Our graduates receive fundamental knowledge that they know how to apply in practice.”

melnykova.name: Nataliia Melnykova

melnykova.text: “The Artificial Intelligence Systems Department is a powerful educational and scientific hub that creates a unique environment for developing talent in AI and IT. It actively implements innovative learning models, combining academic training with practical interaction with the IT industry.”

shakhovska.name: Nataliia Shakhovska

shakhovska.text: “Artificial intelligence is a trend that, according to global analytical companies, will become commonplace in everyday life by 2050. Our graduates receive fundamental knowledge that they know how to apply in practice.”

hero.title: Data Science Club
hero.subtitle: Big data analysis, machine learning, and predictive modeling for solving real business problems.

about.desc1: A community of data enthusiasts based at the AI Systems Department. Here we learn to work with massive datasets, build neural networks, and find hidden patterns in the chaos of raw data.
about.desc2: We work with real datasets, study modern frameworks (Pandas, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow), and participate in Kaggle competitions.
about.mission: To transform raw data into valuable insights and prepare specialists capable of making data-driven decisions.

area0.title: Machine Learning
area0.desc: Building and optimizing predictive models: from linear regression to complex ensembles.

area1.title: Data Analytics
area1.desc: Cleaning, transforming, and deeply analyzing data to uncover non-obvious patterns.

area2.title: Data Visualization
area2.desc: Creating interactive dashboards and visualizing complex relationships for business.

hero.title: StartUp Club
hero.subtitle: A platform for developing business ideas, forming teams, and launching your own tech products.

about.desc1: This is not just a club, it's a real IT incubator. If you have an idea for an app, service, or AI product, we will help you take it from concept to a working MVP.
about.desc2: We learn to validate hypotheses, analyze the market, build business models, and prepare pitches for future investors.
about.mission: To inspire students towards entrepreneurship and provide mentorship support for launching successful startups while still studying.

area0.title: Product Discovery
area0.desc: Idea generation, Customer Development, and verifying product viability at early stages.

area1.title: Go-To-Market
area1.desc: Building a business model, monetization strategy, and attracting early adopters.

area2.title: Pitching & Fundraising
area2.desc: The art of product presentation. How to properly communicate with investors and raise funds.

hero.title: MillTech Club
hero.subtitle: Development of innovative technologies and R&D solutions for defense and security systems.

about.desc1: A club focused on creating dual-use technologies. We work on hardware and software complexes that help protect lives and automate complex processes.
about.desc2: Working with UAVs, secure communication systems, electronic intelligence, and computer vision in harsh environments.
about.mission: Enhancing security and defense capabilities through the implementation of cutting-edge AI technologies and automation.

area0.title: UAV Systems
area0.desc: Drone programming, flight task automation, and payload integration.

area1.title: Signal Processing
area1.desc: Signal processing, secure communications, and electronic monitoring systems.

area2.title: Tactical AI
area2.desc: Applying artificial intelligence for video stream analysis and rapid decision-making.

hero.title: Algorithmic Programming
hero.subtitle: Competitive programming, studying complex algorithms and data structures at a professional level.

about.desc1: The perfect place for those who want to level up their algorithmic thinking. We prepare for international programming olympiads (ICPC) and solve complex problems.
about.desc2: Regular problem breakdowns from LeetCode and Codeforces. Studying dynamic programming, graph theory, and code optimization.
about.mission: To raise an elite group of programmers with flawless logical thinking, ready to pass interviews at top global companies (FAANG).

area0.title: Data Structures
area0.desc: Deep understanding of trees, graphs, hash tables, and their effective application in practice.

area1.title: Algorithm Optimization
area1.desc: Complexity analysis (Big O) and writing the fastest and most optimized code possible.

area2.title: Competitive Coding
area2.desc: Participation in hackathons, online contests, and competitive programming olympiads.

hero.title: GO Club
hero.subtitle: A community of backend developers. We study the Go (Golang) programming language and cloud technologies.

about.desc1: A club for those who want to learn how to create fast, reliable, and high-load server applications. Go is the standard for modern cloud infrastructure.
about.desc2: We develop microservices, work with Docker, Kubernetes, and create real APIs for student projects.
about.mission: Forming a strong community of backend engineers capable of developing scalable Cloud Native solutions.

area0.title: Backend Engineering
area0.desc: Designing REST and gRPC APIs, working with databases (PostgreSQL, Redis).

area1.title: Microservices
area1.desc: Developing distributed systems, inter-service communication, and message brokers (Kafka).

area2.title: Cloud Native
area2.desc: Application containerization (Docker) and deployment in a cloud environment.

hero.title: Robotics Lab
hero.subtitle: Creating autonomous systems, working with drones, microcontrollers, and sensors.

about.desc1: A modern laboratory where the boundary between software code and the physical world fades. We create robots, smart devices, and IoT systems.
about.desc2: Practical work with Arduino, Raspberry Pi, Jetson Nano boards, and the Robot Operating System (ROS).
about.mission: To provide students with the tools and knowledge to develop intelligent autonomous mechanisms.

area0.title: Hardware Development
area0.desc: Circuit design, soldering, working with servos and various types of sensors.

area1.title: Embedded Systems
area1.desc: Low-level programming of microcontrollers (C/C++) and sensor integration.

area2.title: Autonomous Navigation
area2.desc: SLAM algorithms for robot spatial orientation without using GPS.

hero.title: AI Lab
hero.subtitle: Deep study of artificial intelligence algorithms, model architectures, and natural language processing.

about.desc1: A hub for fundamental and applied research in AI. We look under the hood of neural networks and create our own architectures.
about.desc2: Focus on Computer Vision (object recognition), NLP (text understanding, chatbot creation), and generative AI.
about.mission: To make complex AI concepts accessible for understanding and practical use in student R&D projects.

area0.title: Deep Learning
area0.desc: Training deep neural networks, weight optimization, and hyperparameter tuning.

area1.title: NLP Solutions
area1.desc: Working with Large Language Models (LLM), sentiment analysis, and machine translation.

area2.title: Computer Vision
area2.desc: Facial recognition systems, anomaly detection in video, and image segmentation.

hero.title: 3D Modelling Lab
hero.subtitle: Creating 3D models, simulations, virtual reality, and computer graphics.

about.desc1: A creative space for those who combine art with technology. We create assets for games, metaverses, and scientific simulations.
about.desc2: We work in Blender, ZBrush, and study Unity and Unreal Engine. We develop digital twins of physical objects.
about.mission: To teach students how to visualize the future through high-quality 3D graphics and immersive simulations.

area0.title: 3D Design
area0.desc: Sculpting, object modeling, texture creation, and lighting setup.

area1.title: VR / AR
area1.desc: Developing virtual and augmented reality applications for Oculus headsets and mobile devices.

area2.title: Physics Simulation
area2.desc: Software simulation of physical processes, gravity, and fluids for robotics and the gaming industry.

UnitCommon.areasSubtitle: Focusing our expertise on the most promising and impactful domains of IT.

geoanalytics.title: Geoanalytics
geoanalytics.description: Innovative interdisciplinary bachelor's program 'Geoanalytics' at the intersection of computer science and Earth sciences.

hero.title: Geoanalytics
hero.specialty: The future of IT at the intersection of Computer Science and Earth Sciences. Joint program of the AI Systems and Higher Geodesy departments.

mission.title: Specialist Profile & Key Competencies
mission.desc: Training unique specialists with practical skills for developing solutions in environmental monitoring, smart infrastructure, and resource management based on two institutes of Lviv Polytechnic.

advantages.title: Key Training Areas

0.title: Study Structure
0.desc: Equal combination of IT and Geo blocks to train interdisciplinary specialists.

1.title: Artificial Intelligence
1.desc: Creating models for image classification, forecasting, and automated satellite data analysis.

2.title: Big Data & ML
2.desc: Analyzing massive geospatial datasets to identify patterns and make decisions.

3.title: Geospatial Analysis
3.desc: Working with GIS technologies and spatial databases for natural process modeling.

4.title: Satellite Monitoring
4.desc: Using SAR technologies and analyzing images from satellites and drones.

5.title: Cloud Services
5.desc: Developing info-system architectures and using analytical data warehouses.

6.title: Ecology & Safety
6.desc: Solving complex tasks in soil erosion monitoring and industrial risk analysis.

7.title: MLOps
7.desc: Full development cycle: from image processing to machine learning model deployment.

advantages.footer: Geoanalytics is the integration of modern IT solutions and geospatial analysis for strategic industries.

career.title: Career Prospects in Strategic Industries
career.desc: Graduates are ready to work in sectors shaping the future of technology for the next 5–10 years.

melnykova.text: Geoanalytics allows combining programming skills with a deep understanding of geographic information systems to solve safety and environmental tasks.
melnykova.name: Geoanalytics Direction

shakhovska.text: We create specialists capable of automating the analysis of petabytes of data generated daily by satellites, drones, and sensors.
shakhovska.name: Computer Science Direction
